name: Clara & the Below
overview: To save her bedridden ex-military father, Clara must fight the spirits of the soldiers he killed on the battlefield, in a surreal world under her house known simply as the Below. She is aided by a mischievous toy nutcracker who represents her innocence and childhood, her only guide in a place where the ghosts of the past run rampant.

trailers.title: Our (very, very, very!) early concept Chompers looked quite different than he does now!
Did you know that Clara could have looked very different? ⚔️  ❄️ Here are some early explorations!
CHARACTER EXPLORATION NEVER FELT SO GHOULS 🎨
Some concept art of our dynamic duo, Clara and Chompers!
Character Explorations of Clara's Father (AKA Diseased Dad Designs) 🎨
A behind the scenes look at how our sequence transformed from animatic into final animation! 🎬
SNEAK PEAK of some early Chompers designs!
A behind the scenes look at some of our icy heroine Clara's explorations and design process!
